name: VaultSpark Football GM
currentFocus: Session 13 shipped CI-friendly test shards, restored missing local Studio helper modules exposed by startup smoke, and added static Pages smoke gates before public artifact upload.
nextMilestone: Run the new shard matrix in GitHub Actions and finish provider/repo GitHub Pages settings.
blockers: GitHub Pages provider/repo settings still need final external confirmation before public launch

testSuiteStatus.coverage: Default npm test now runs core, runtime, sim-contract, sim-realism, and studio shards with 131 passing tests; explicit long smoke shard adds 3 passing determinism/realism pipeline tests.

highlights: Priority Inbox (CRITICAL/IMPORTANT/FLAVOR tiers, bell badge, slide-in drawer)
Live Sim-Watch overlay (300ms animated drive log, key play cards)
Franchise Moment card (cinematic post-game drama + share button)
GM Decision modal (pre-advance choices on critical weeks)
Cap War Room (4-year visual cap timeline, color-coded risk zones)
Trade Breakdown card (A-F letter grades, fairness verdict)
Season Narrative Arcs (3 dynamic story threads per season)
GM Persona progress bar + confetti tier-up burst
SimJob TTL cleanup (10-min eviction, prevents OOM)
5 new API endpoints (season-arcs, gm-decision, records/franchise, team-archetypes, franchise-moment)
Mobile 375px overflow fixes across all new modals
